text.content: With the forestry series gaining a strong reputation in the industry, Maxam has expanded the program to include the all-new MS930 to the lineup. The MS930 is engineered to provide the efficiency and strength of the Logxtra series while providing exceptional value to every site, making it a formidable solution for the forestry industry.
